title: Monoclonal antibodies
script_summary: Exploring the fascinating world of monoclonal antibodies and their potential impact on health.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about monoclonal antibodies.
Monoclonal antibodies are lab-made proteins designed to mimic immune system functions.
They target specific pathogens, making them powerful tools against diseases.
Recent studies show their effectiveness in treating conditions like COVID-19 and cancer.
However, ongoing research is crucial; outcomes aren’t guaranteed for everyone.
Stay curious and follow for more science insights!
